evals.prompt: Create a scrollable web narrative from this German pitch narrative (sales-presentation.md, Energieversorger segment, why-change methodology). Language: de, conversion_goal: consultation, interactive: false.
evals.expected_output: A web-brief.md with 6-10 sections, hero first (dark), CTA last (accent), assertion headlines, German umlauts preserved, no color fields, CTA summary with primary_cta, rendering prompt with absolute paths.

evals.prompt: Create a scrollable web narrative from this English AI Operations narrative (arc-narrative.md, corporate-visions arc). Language: en, conversion_goal: demo, interactive: false.
evals.expected_output: A web-brief.md with 6-10 sections, hero first (dark), CTA last (accent), assertion headlines in English, no color fields, CTA summary with primary_cta, rendering prompt with absolute paths.

evals.prompt: Create a scrollable web narrative from this German why-change phase narrative (01-why-change/narrative.md, no arc_id in frontmatter). Language: de, conversion_goal: consultation, interactive: false.
evals.expected_output: A web-brief.md with 6-10 sections, arc type auto-detected, hero first (dark), CTA last (accent), assertion headlines, German umlauts preserved, no color fields, CTA summary with primary_cta, rendering prompt with absolute paths.
